mapper.select: SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.CMPX_CD, A.RESV_NO, A.RESV_STAT, A.RESV_USER_NM, A.RM_NO, A.RM_TP_CD, A.ARR_DT, A.DEP_DT, A.DEP_HOUR, A.CHK_IN_HOUR, A.CHK_OUT_HOUR, A.PER_NM, A.PER_USE_LANG, A.PER_PASS_NO, A.PER_ADULT_QTY, A.PER_CHILD_QTY, A.CAR_NO, A.USE_YN FROM PMS.PMS_RESERVATION A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND A.RESV_NO = #{resvNo} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.CMPX_CD, A.RESV_NO, A.RESV_STAT, A.RM_NO, A.PER_NM, A.PER_USE_LANG, A.ARR_DT, A.DEP_DT, A.CHK_IN_HOUR FROM PMS.PMS_RESERVATION A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND A.RESV_STAT = 'I' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CHK_IN_HOUR DESC

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.CMPX_CD, A.RESV_NO, A.RESV_STAT, A.RM_NO, A.PER_NM, A.PER_USE_LANG, A.ARR_DT, A.DEP_DT, A.CHK_IN_HOUR, A.CHK_OUT_HOUR FROM PMS.PMS_RESERVATION A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND A.CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.RESV_NO DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT A.USER_ID, A.PROP_CD, A.CMPX_CD, A.USER_NM, A.USER_PW, A.USER_TP, A.DEPT_CD, A.USER_LOCALE, A.USER_TEL_NO, A.USER_EMAIL, A.USER_MOBILE, A.USER_WK_STAT, A.USE_YN FROM PMS.PMS_USER_MTR A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
